pi_items.source: WooCommerce API documentation confirms get_backorders() returns 'yes'|'no'|'notify'; github.com/woocommerce/woocommerce source code
WooCommerce Code Reference; Low stock threshold is numeric field (stored as integer in postmeta)
WooCommerce postmeta stores _manage_stock as 'yes'|'no' string values; setup_woocommerce.sh line 235 creates with manage_stock=true
WooCommerce 3.3+ introduced 'onbackorder' stock status; valid values are 'instock'|'outofstock'|'onbackorder'

privileged_info_summary: The task modifies the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' product (SKU: WBH-001), a synthetic product created during WooCommerce environment setup. All metadata claims are verified WooCommerce field values: _backorders field expects 'notify' (Allow, but notify customer); _low_stock_amount expects numeric value 5 for product-level threshold override; _manage_stock expects 'yes' to enable inventory tracking; _stock_status expects 'onbackorder' which WooCommerce 3.3+ automatically sets when stock is at or below 0 with backorders enabled. The task requires enabling backorders with customer notification while maintaining stock management and setting a custom low stock threshold.
